22.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

22.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
22.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

22.gl: rule; also (concretely in plural) a realm or a ruler
